description: Guard against false personality-patterns routing (guard-recent-relational): description uses category-adjacent vocabulary but is actually anxiety territory. classify should recommend anxiety and leave outOfScope null.

expectedQualities.notes: False-positive guard: description uses personality-patterns-adjacent language but is actually anxiety territory. Should recommend anxiety path, NOT route to outOfScope.

payload.intakeText: My partner and I have been fighting more and I'm worried we're going to break up. I feel anxious all the time about it. I keep checking my phone, replaying our conversations, looking for signs that he's losing interest. I haven't been like this in previous relationships.
